title: Show Your Work: Understanding Time and Effort Reporting — eTraining Module
display_label: Time and Effort Reporting eTraining (Articulate Rise)
content: Self-paced Articulate Rise module that demystifies the time and effort reporting process at MSU. Explains the federal certification mechanism by which faculty, staff, and students account for time and related salary costs spent on research projects, and walks through MSU's certification workflow. Distinct from the legacy D-RED Time & Effort interactive at rise.articulate.com/share/YUeYo_t7gEEPZQPjwbuFNy3UD03HIsYQ — this eTraining version is the current canonical module.
